name: Poached Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1 Remove skin and bone from chicken breasts. Cut into 2 parts each and place in a baking dish.
2 Sprinkle with lemon juice, dot with butter, and season with salt to taste.
3 Cover closely and bake for about 15 minutes. Do not overcook; check the thickest part with a fork to ensure it is cooked through.
4 Use the pan juices as a sauce.
